name: Wai Ka Sun
headline: BCI, AI, robotics, spatial intelligence
mission: I build neural interfaces that turn human intent into physical action.
longVision: A future where neural interfaces let people control the machines and environments around them without relying on phone screens.
bio: Incoming Columbia MSAI Robotics Track student and Tsinghua-trained cross-disciplinary builder working across BCI, AI systems, robot learning, humanoid control, and spatial intelligence. Trained through architecture and computational design, I think in bodies, machines, and environments.

latestNews.text: Incoming Columbia MSAI Robotics Track student.
Mingxi Scholarship recipient, selected 4/533 by the Chief Executive of Hong Kong.
MindBridge selected as one of the first batches of disruptive innovation talent training programs at Tsinghua University.
